title: WTL Profile
description: Configuration profile for Work Time Logger (profile.toml)

mapping.description: Jinja2 templates that map CSV columns to job attributes on import.

name.description: Jinja2 template for the job name. Available variables: all CSV column names.

description.description: Jinja2 template for the job description.

job_code.description: Jinja2 template for the job code used in export grouping.

extract.description: Regex patterns (with named groups) to extract variables from stored values.

job_code.description: Regex to decompose job_code into named variables.

defaults.description: Default values for variables when regex extraction yields no match.

group_by.description: List of variable names to group logs by before aggregating time and notes.

time_precision.description: Number of decimal places for aggregated_time.

time_aggregation_method.description: Aggregation method for times within a group: 'sum_then_round' sums all raw times before rounding, 'round_then_sum' rounds each entry before summing, 'round_subtotal_then_sum' rounds the subtotal of each unique note item before summing.

note_item.description: Jinja2 template for each log's note entry. Available: all extracted variables + memo, time_hours, project_name, job_name.
examples: {% if prefix %}({{ prefix }}:{{ time_hours }}):{% endif %}{{ memo }}

note_separator.description: String used to join multiple note_item values.

columns.description: Mapping from output CSV column names to Jinja2 templates. Available: all extracted variables + aggregated_time, aggregated_notes, project_name, job_name.

additionalProperties.description: Jinja2 template for the column value.
